messages.content:
你是 story 聚类复核器。

输入是一组候选事件帧（含候选分组线索）。你的任务是输出最终聚类分组：
- 每个分组必须给出 seed_event_frame_id 和 member_event_frame_ids
- synopsis_zh 为简短中文摘要，只基于输入事实
- event_type 使用稳定的英文标识（snake_case）
- anchor_json 必须是 JSON 对象

规则：
- 只能使用输入提供的 event_frame_id
- 可以输出空数组（表示不形成分组）
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "groups": [
    {
      "seed_event_frame_id": "...",
      "member_event_frame_ids": ["..."],
      "synopsis_zh": "...",
      "event_type": "...",
      "anchor_json": {}
    }
  ]
}

{"candidate_frames": [{"event_frame_id": "68cfc2c9-4a42-41c6-9e7c-d78a5b4fd6cc", "article_id": "cd35ea92-1df0-47f7-afc0-7b6f7364ca25", "source_name": "Vogue Fashion", "source_lang": "en", "event_type": "celebrity_wearing_designer", "brand": "", "person": "", "collection": "", "season": "", "place": "", "action_text": "", "object_text": "", "evidence_snippets": ["Taylor-Joy, who plays the iconic character Princess Peach in the forthcoming The Super Mario Galaxy Movie, stepped out for a photo call in Tokyo wearing a full custom Jacquemus look. Styled by Ryan Hastings, she wore a soft pink bandeau top and matching pink fishtail midi skirt, paired with an extreme wide-rimmed pink hat that framed her head like a halo—or a video game avatar. She opted for Tiffany&Co rings, with some strappy Giuseppe Zanotti white sandals."], "anchor_json": {"designer": "Jacquemus", "stylist": "Ryan Hastings", "color_palette": "blush pink", "silhouette": "'50s-era ladylike with playful twist"}}]}
